name: finance-bot
description: Telegram bot that parses expense messages and logs them to Google Sheets

scripts.build: npm run build -w @finance-bot/shared && npm run build -w @finance-bot/server-core && npm run build -w apps-bot && npm run build -w apps-api && npm run build -w apps-client
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @finance-bot/shared && npm run build -w @finance-bot/server-core && npm run build -w apps-bot && npm run build -w apps-api
scripts.build:bot: npm run build -w @finance-bot/shared && npm run build -w @finance-bot/server-core && npm run build -w apps-bot
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,bot -c blue,green "npm run start -w apps-api" "npm run start -w apps-bot"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps-api" "npm run dev -w apps-bot" "npm run dev -w apps-client"
scripts.lint: eslint packages/shared packages/server-core apps/api apps/bot apps/client
scripts.lint:fix: eslint packages/shared packages/server-core apps/api apps/bot apps/client --fix
